title: OpenAI 兼容服务器：从 HTTP 请求到 AsyncLLM 的异步桥
one_liner: 一条 HTTP 请求如何穿过 FastAPI lifespan / build_async_engine_client（起 AsyncLLM）→ OpenAIServing 基类的校验与 request_id → Renderer 把 chat messages 渲染成 token prompt → AsyncLLM.generate 产出的异步生成器，再分流成 SSE 逐 token 流（DELTA）或聚合成单个 JSON（FINAL_ONLY），最后被 uvicorn launcher 优雅关停。承接 ch31 离线 LLM 对照与 ch04 异步三段式。
code_spine: vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:L671-L703 — run_server → run_server_worker：单 worker 入口，进入 build_async_engine_client 上下文，再 build_and_serve，最后 await shutdown_task
vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:L77-L106 — build_async_engine_client：从 CLI args 造 AsyncEngineArgs，委托 build_async_engine_client_from_engine_args
vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:L108-L155 — build_async_engine_client_from_engine_args：AsyncLLM.from_vllm_config 起引擎，finally shutdown（对接 ch04 三段式）
vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:L533-L575 — setup_server：校验 args、SIGTERM handler、绑定 socket（先于引擎启动以避免端口竞争）
vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:L157-L314 — build_app：FastAPI(lifespan=lifespan)、注册路由、CORS、鉴权/X-Request-Id 中间件、6 个 exception_handler

vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:L317-L429 — init_app_state：构造 OpenAIServingModels / OpenAIServingRender / OpenAIServingTokenization，并经 init_generate_state 造 OpenAIServingChat/Completion，挂到 app.state
vllm/entrypoints/openai/server_utils.py:L446-L472 — lifespan：启动期 _force_log 后台任务、freeze_gc_heap、yield 后清理
vllm/entrypoints/openai/chat_completion/api_router.py:L40-L74 — POST /v1/chat/completions handler：with_cancellation + load_aware_call 装饰，按返回类型分流 JSONResponse vs StreamingResponse(text/event-stream)
vllm/entrypoints/openai/chat_completion/serving.py:L229-L384 — create_chat_completion：渲染 → request_id → 取 LoRA → 算 max_tokens/SamplingParams → engine_client.generate → 按 request.stream 分流两条生成器
vllm/entrypoints/serve/render/serving.py:L184-L267 — render_chat：chat template 校验 → preprocess_chat → (conversation, engine_inputs)

vllm/entrypoints/serve/render/serving.py:L523-L606 — preprocess_chat：build_chat_params/build_tok_params → renderer.render_chat_async（chat template→prompt token_ids），再做 reasoning/tool parser 的 adjust_request
vllm/entrypoints/openai/chat_completion/serving.py:L408-L1146 — chat_completion_stream_generator：SSE，逐 res 逐 output 推 DeltaMessage，首块带 role，末块带 finish_reason，可选 usage，最后 [DONE]
vllm/entrypoints/openai/chat_completion/serving.py:L1148-L1555 — chat_completion_full_generator：async for 聚合到 final_res，组装 ChatCompletionResponse + UsageInfo 一次返回
vllm/entrypoints/launcher.py:L26-L142 — serve_http：建 uvicorn.Config/Server，watchdog_task + server_task + handle_shutdown，SIGINT/SIGTERM → shutdown_event → engine.shutdown → server.should_exit
vllm/entrypoints/launcher.py:L144-L167 — watchdog_loop / terminate_if_errored：每 5s 检查引擎 errored，触发优雅退出（修复 StreamingResponse 生成器内异常不会自动关停的问题）

elide: decorate_logs 仅给日志加进程前缀，可一句话带过
embed_excerpts.code:
async def run_server(args, **uvicorn_kwargs) -> None:
    """Run a single-worker API server."""

    # Add process-specific prefix to stdout and stderr.
    decorate_logs("APIServer")

    listen_address, sock = setup_server(args)
    await run_server_worker(listen_address, sock, args, **uvicorn_kwargs)


async def run_server_worker(
    listen_address, sock, args, client_config=None, **uvicorn_kwargs
) -> None:
    """Run a single API server worker."""

    if args.tool_parser_plugin and len(args.tool_parser_plugin) > 3:
        ToolParserManager.import_tool_parser(args.tool_parser_plugin)

    if args.reasoning_parser_plugin and len(args.reasoning_parser_plugin) > 3:
        ReasoningParserManager.import_reasoning_parser(args.reasoning_parser_plugin)

    async with build_async_engine_client(
        args,
        client_config=client_config,
    ) as engine_client:
        shutdown_task = await build_and_serve(
            engine_client, listen_address, sock, args, **uvicorn_kwargs
        )
    # NB: Await server shutdown only after the backend context is exited
    try:
        await shutdown_task
    finally:
        sock.close()

elide: forkserver 预导入分支（仅当 VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD==forkserver）可省略，主线是 from_cli_args + 委托
embed_excerpts.code:
@asynccontextmanager
async def build_async_engine_client(
    args: Namespace,
    *,
    usage_context: UsageContext = UsageContext.OPENAI_API_SERVER,
    client_config: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> AsyncIterator[EngineClient]:
    # ... forkserver pre-import branch elided ...

    # Context manager to handle engine_client lifecycle
    # Ensures everything is shutdown and cleaned up on error/exit
    engine_args = AsyncEngineArgs.from_cli_args(args)
    if client_config:
        engine_args._api_process_count = client_config.get("client_count", 1)
        engine_args._api_process_rank = client_config.get("client_index", 0)

    async with build_async_engine_client_from_engine_args(
        engine_args,
        usage_context=usage_context,
        client_config=client_config,
    ) as engine:
        yield engine

elide: client_config 的 client_count/client_index 拆分仅多 API 进程时有意义，单进程默认 1/0
embed_excerpts.code:
@asynccontextmanager
async def build_async_engine_client_from_engine_args(
    engine_args: AsyncEngineArgs,
    *,
    usage_context: UsageContext = UsageContext.OPENAI_API_SERVER,
    client_config: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> AsyncIterator[EngineClient]:
    # Create the EngineConfig (determines if we can use V1).
    vllm_config = engine_args.create_engine_config(usage_context=usage_context)

    from vllm.v1.engine.async_llm import AsyncLLM

    async_llm: AsyncLLM | None = None

    # Don't mutate the input client_config
    client_config = dict(client_config) if client_config else {}
    client_count = client_config.pop("client_count", 1)
    client_index = client_config.pop("client_index", 0)

    try:
        async_llm = AsyncLLM.from_vllm_config(
            vllm_config=vllm_config,
            usage_context=usage_context,
            enable_log_requests=engine_args.enable_log_requests,
            aggregate_engine_logging=engine_args.aggregate_engine_logging,
            disable_log_stats=engine_args.disable_log_stats,
            client_addresses=client_config,
            client_count=client_count,
            client_index=client_index,
        )

        # Don't keep the dummy data in memory
        assert async_llm is not None
        await async_llm.reset_mm_cache()

        yield async_llm
    finally:
        if async_llm:
            async_llm.shutdown()

elide: log_version_and_model/log_non_default_args 仅日志；reasoning/tool parser plugin 导入可省；uds/ipv6 分支非主线
embed_excerpts.code:
@instrument(span_name="API server setup")
def setup_server(args):
    """Validate API server args, set up signal handler, create socket
    ready to serve."""
    # ... logging + plugin imports elided ...

    validate_api_server_args(args)

    # workaround to make sure that we bind the port before the engine is set up.
    # This avoids race conditions with ray.
    # see https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/8204
    if args.uds:
        sock = create_server_unix_socket(args.uds)
    else:
        sock_addr = (args.host or "", args.port)
        sock = create_server_socket(sock_addr)

    # workaround to avoid footguns where uvicorn drops requests with too
    # many concurrent requests active
    set_ulimit()

    def signal_handler(*_) -> None:
        # Interrupt server on sigterm while initializing
        raise KeyboardInterrupt("terminated")

    signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, signal_handler)
    # ... compute listen_address string elided ...
    return listen_address, sock

elide: serve_http 的一大串 ssl_*/h11_* 参数透传可缩写；log_config 取值非主线
embed_excerpts.code:
async def build_and_serve(
    engine_client: EngineClient,
    listen_address: str,
    sock: socket.socket,
    args: Namespace,
    **uvicorn_kwargs,
) -> asyncio.Task:
    """Build FastAPI app, initialize state, and start serving.

    Returns the shutdown task for the caller to await.
    """
    # ... log_config setup elided ...

    supported_tasks = await engine_client.get_supported_tasks()
    model_config = engine_client.model_config

    logger.info("Supported tasks: %s", supported_tasks)
    app = build_app(args, supported_tasks, model_config)
    await init_app_state(engine_client, app.state, args, supported_tasks)

    logger.info("Starting vLLM server on %s", listen_address)

    return await serve_http(
        app,
        sock=sock,
        host=args.host,
        port=args.port,
        log_level=args.uvicorn_log_level,
        access_log=not args.disable_uvicorn_access_log,
        timeout_keep_alive=envs.VLLM_HTTP_TIMEOUT_KEEP_ALIVE,
        # ... ssl_* / h11_* kwargs elided ...
        **uvicorn_kwargs,
    )

elide: build_app 中按 supported_tasks 条件注册大量子路由（pooling/transcription/realtime/disagg/rlhf 等）只需点到为止；中间件循环、sagemaker bootstrap 非主线
embed_excerpts.code:
def build_app(
    args: Namespace,
    supported_tasks: tuple["SupportedTask", ...] | None = None,
    model_config: ModelConfig | None = None,
) -> FastAPI:
    # ... disable_fastapi_docs / offline_docs branches elided ...
    app = FastAPI(lifespan=lifespan)
    app.state.args = args

    # ... register_vllm_serve_api_routers / models / sagemaker / generate / ... elided ...
    if "generate" in supported_tasks:
        from vllm.entrypoints.openai.generate.api_router import (
            register_generate_api_routers,
        )
        register_generate_api_routers(app)
        # ... other conditional routers elided ...

    app.root_path = args.root_path
    app.add_middleware(CORSMiddleware, allow_origins=args.allowed_origins, ...)

    app.exception_handler(HTTPException)(http_exception_handler)
    app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)(validation_exception_handler)
    app.exception_handler(EngineGenerateError)(engine_error_handler)
    app.exception_handler(EngineDeadError)(engine_error_handler)
    app.exception_handler(GenerationError)(generation_error_handler)
    app.exception_handler(Exception)(exception_handler)
    # ... AuthenticationMiddleware / XRequestIdMiddleware / ScalingMiddleware elided ...
    return app

elide: lora_modules 合并、transcription/realtime/pooling 等条件分支可省，主线是把各 OpenAIServing* 对象挂到 state
embed_excerpts.code:
async def init_app_state(
    engine_client: EngineClient,
    state: State,
    args: Namespace,
    supported_tasks: tuple["SupportedTask", ...] | None = None,
) -> None:
    vllm_config = engine_client.vllm_config
    # ... served_model_names / request_logger / base_model_paths setup elided ...

    state.engine_client = engine_client
    state.log_stats = not args.disable_log_stats
    state.vllm_config = vllm_config
    state.args = args
    resolved_chat_template = load_chat_template(args.chat_template)

    state.openai_serving_models = OpenAIServingModels(
        engine_client=engine_client,
        base_model_paths=base_model_paths,
        lora_modules=lora_modules,
    )
    await state.openai_serving_models.init_static_loras()

    state.openai_serving_render = OpenAIServingRender(
        model_config=engine_client.model_config,
        renderer=engine_client.renderer,
        model_registry=state.openai_serving_models.registry,
        request_logger=request_logger,
        chat_template=resolved_chat_template,
        chat_template_content_format=args.chat_template_content_format,
        # ... tool/reasoning parser names + flags elided ...
    )

    state.openai_serving_tokenization = OpenAIServingTokenization(...)

    if "generate" in supported_tasks:
        from vllm.entrypoints.openai.generate.api_router import init_generate_state
        await init_generate_state(
            engine_client, state, args, request_logger, supported_tasks
        )
    # ... transcription / realtime / pooling branches elided ...

elide: yield 后的最终 finally（gc app state）只读到 L472，主线为启动 _force_log 后台任务 + freeze_gc_heap
embed_excerpts.code:
@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    try:
        if app.state.log_stats:
            engine_client: EngineClient = app.state.engine_client

            async def _force_log():
                while True:
                    await asyncio.sleep(envs.VLLM_LOG_STATS_INTERVAL)
                    await engine_client.do_log_stats()

            task = asyncio.create_task(_force_log())
            _running_tasks.add(task)
            task.add_done_callback(_running_tasks.remove)
        else:
            task = None

        # Mark the startup heap as static so that it's ignored by GC.
        # Reduces pause times of oldest generation collections.
        freeze_gc_heap()
        try:
            yield
        finally:
            if task is not None:
                task.cancel()
    finally:
        # Ensure app state including engine ref is gc'd
        ...

elide: batch endpoint 与 metrics_header 细节非主线
多 engine_input 的 sub_request_id 循环（n>1/多 prompt）、beam_search 分支、reasoning_ended 预判分支可压缩为注释；主线：render → request_id → SamplingParams → engine_client.generate → 按 stream 分流
embed_excerpts.code:
async def create_chat_completion(
    self,
    request: ChatCompletionRequest,
    raw_request: Request | None = None,
) -> AsyncGenerator[str, None] | ChatCompletionResponse | ErrorResponse:
    tokenizer = self.renderer.tokenizer
    assert tokenizer is not None
    chat_template_kwargs = self._effective_chat_template_kwargs(request)
    reasoning_parser: ReasoningParser | None = None
    if self.reasoning_parser_cls:
        reasoning_parser = self.reasoning_parser_cls(tokenizer, ...)
    result = await self.render_chat_request(request)
    if isinstance(result, ErrorResponse):
        return result

    conversation, engine_inputs = result

    request_id = (
        f"chatcmpl-{self._base_request_id(raw_request, request.request_id)}"
    )

    request_metadata = RequestResponseMetadata(request_id=request_id)
    if raw_request:
        raw_request.state.request_metadata = request_metadata

    lora_request = self._maybe_get_adapters(request, supports_default_mm_loras=True)
    model_name = self.models.model_name(lora_request)
    data_parallel_rank = self._get_data_parallel_rank(raw_request)

    max_model_len = self.model_config.max_model_len
    generators: list[AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput, None]] = []
    for i, engine_input in enumerate(engine_inputs):
        # ... sub_request_id, max_tokens, SamplingParams, _log_inputs, trace_headers ...
        sampling_params = request.to_sampling_params(
            max_tokens, self.default_sampling_params,
        )
        # ... reasoning_ended pre-check elided ...
        generator = self.engine_client.generate(
            engine_input,
            sampling_params,
            sub_request_id,
            lora_request=lora_request,
            trace_headers=trace_headers,
            priority=request.priority,
            data_parallel_rank=data_parallel_rank,
            reasoning_ended=reasoning_ended,
            reasoning_parser_kwargs=...,
        )
        generators.append(generator)

    assert len(generators) == 1
    (result_generator,) = generators

    if request.stream:
        return self.chat_completion_stream_generator(
            request, result_generator, request_id, model_name,
            conversation, tokenizer, request_metadata, reasoning_parser,
            chat_template_kwargs=chat_template_kwargs,
        )

    return await self.chat_completion_full_generator(
        request, result_generator, request_id, model_name,
        conversation, tokenizer, request_metadata, reasoning_parser,
    )

async def render_chat_request(
    self,
    request: ChatCompletionRequest,
) -> tuple[list[ConversationMessage], list[EngineInput]] | ErrorResponse:
    error_check_ret = await self._check_model(request)
    if error_check_ret is not None:
        logger.error("Error with model %s", error_check_ret)
        return error_check_ret

    # If the engine is dead, raise the engine's DEAD_ERROR.
    # This is required for the streaming case, where we return a
    # success status before we actually start generating text :).
    if self.engine_client.errored:
        raise self.engine_client.dead_error

    return await self.openai_serving_render.render_chat(request)

elide: preprocess_chat 头部 default_template_kwargs 合并、mistral 重序列化、reasoning/tool adjust_request 后处理只需点到；主线是 build_chat_params + renderer.render_chat_async
运行时 LoRA 加载分支（VLLM_ALLOW_RUNTIME_LORA_UPDATING）非主线
use_harmony / mistral grammar / 多 num_choices 分支大幅省略；只保留首块发 role、跳空块、普通 delta_text=output.text 主线

try:
    async for res in result_generator:
        if res.prompt_token_ids is not None:
            num_prompt_tokens = len(res.prompt_token_ids)
            # ... encoder prompt add elided ...

        # We need to do it here, because if there are exceptions in
        # the result_generator, it needs to be sent as the FIRST
        # response (by the try...catch).
        if first_iteration:
            num_cached_tokens = res.num_cached_tokens
            role = self.get_chat_request_role(request)
            for i in range(num_choices):
                choice_data = ChatCompletionResponseStreamChoice(
                    index=i,
                    delta=DeltaMessage(role=role, content=""),
                    logprobs=None,
                    finish_reason=None,
                )
                chunk = ChatCompletionStreamResponse(
                    id=request_id,
                    object=chunk_object_type,
                    created=created_time,
                    choices=[choice_data],
                    model=model_name,
                    prompt_token_ids=(...),
                )
                data = chunk.model_dump_json(exclude_unset=True)
                yield f"data: {data}\n\n"
            # ... echo branch elided ...
            first_iteration = False

        for output in res.outputs:
            i = output.index
            # ... parser / logprobs / harmony branches elided ...
            delta_text = output.text

            if (
                not delta_text
                and not output.token_ids
                and not previous_num_tokens[i]
            ):
                # Chunked prefill case, don't return empty chunks
                continue
            # ... build delta_message via tool/reasoning parsers (elided) ...

elide: include_continuous_usage 的每块 usage、enable_log_outputs 收尾日志可省
embed_excerpts.code:
choice_data = maybe_filter_parallel_tool_calls(choice_data, request)
                chunk = ChatCompletionStreamResponse(
                    id=request_id,
                    object=chunk_object_type,
                    created=created_time,
                    choices=[choice_data],
                    model=model_name,
                )
                # Stamp the fingerprint on terminal chunks only ...
                if (
                    not include_usage
                    and self.system_fingerprint is not None
                    and choice_data.finish_reason is not None
                ):
                    chunk.system_fingerprint = self.system_fingerprint
                # ... continuous usage elided ...
                data = chunk.model_dump_json(exclude_unset=True)
                yield f"data: {data}\n\n"

    # once the final token is handled, if stream_options.include_usage
    # is sent, send the usage
    if include_usage:
        completion_tokens = sum(previous_num_tokens)
        final_usage = UsageInfo(
            prompt_tokens=num_prompt_tokens,
            completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
            total_tokens=num_prompt_tokens + completion_tokens,
        )
        # ... prompt_tokens_details elided ...
        final_usage_chunk = ChatCompletionStreamResponse(
            id=request_id, object=chunk_object_type, created=created_time,
            choices=[], model=model_name, usage=final_usage,
            system_fingerprint=self.system_fingerprint,
        )
        final_usage_data = final_usage_chunk.model_dump_json(
            exclude_unset=True, exclude_none=True
        )
        yield f"data: {final_usage_data}\n\n"

    # report to FastAPI middleware aggregate usage across all choices
    request_metadata.final_usage_info = UsageInfo(...)
    # ... enable_log_outputs branch elided ...

except GenerationError as e:
    yield f"data: {self._convert_generation_error_to_streaming_response(e)}\n\n"
except Exception as e:
    logger.exception("Error in chat completion stream generator.")
    data = self.create_streaming_error_response(e)
    yield f"data: {data}\n\n"
# Send the final done message after all response.n are finished
yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"

elide: use_harmony 分支、各 tool_choice 组装 message 的长 if/elif 链可压缩为『按 tool_choice 组装 ChatMessage』一句；只保留聚合 + 组装 ChatCompletionResponse 主线
embed_excerpts.code:
async def chat_completion_full_generator(
    self,
    request: ChatCompletionRequest,
    result_generator: AsyncIterator[RequestOutput],
    request_id: str,
    model_name: str,
    conversation: list[ConversationMessage],
    tokenizer: TokenizerLike,
    request_metadata: RequestResponseMetadata,
    reasoning_parser: ReasoningParser | None = None,
) -> ErrorResponse | ChatCompletionResponse:
    created_time = int(time.time())
    final_res: RequestOutput | None = None

    try:
        async for res in result_generator:
            final_res = res
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        return self.create_error_response("Client disconnected")

    if final_res is None:
        return self.create_error_response(
            "No output received from the engine.",
            err_type="InternalServerError",
            status_code=HTTPStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
        )

    choices: list[ChatCompletionResponseChoice] = []
    role = self.get_chat_request_role(request)
    for output in final_res.outputs:
        self._raise_if_error(output.finish_reason, request_id)
        # ... logprobs + reasoning/tool parsing build `message` (elided long if-chain) ...
        choice_data = ChatCompletionResponseChoice(
            index=output.index,
            message=message,
            logprobs=logprobs,
            finish_reason="tool_calls" if is_finish_reason_tool_calls
            else output.finish_reason if output.finish_reason else "stop",
            stop_reason=output.stop_reason,
            token_ids=(...),
        )
        choices.append(choice_data)

    num_prompt_tokens = len(final_res.prompt_token_ids)
    num_generated_tokens = sum(len(o.token_ids) for o in final_res.outputs)
    usage = UsageInfo(
        prompt_tokens=num_prompt_tokens,
        completion_tokens=num_generated_tokens,
        total_tokens=num_prompt_tokens + num_generated_tokens,
    )
    request_metadata.final_usage_info = usage

    response = ChatCompletionResponse(
        id=request_id, created=created_time, model=model_name,
        choices=choices, usage=usage,
        system_fingerprint=self.system_fingerprint,
        prompt_logprobs=clamp_prompt_logprobs(final_res.prompt_logprobs),
        prompt_token_ids=(...),
        kv_transfer_params=final_res.kv_transfer_params,
    )
    return response

elide: serve_http 开头打印路由列表、h11 header 限制取默认、SSLCertRefresher 分支非主线
embed_excerpts.code:
config = uvicorn.Config(app, **uvicorn_kwargs)
    # Set header limits
    config.h11_max_incomplete_event_size = h11_max_incomplete_event_size
    config.h11_max_header_count = h11_max_header_count
    config.load()
    server = uvicorn.Server(config)
    app.state.server = server

    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()

    watchdog_task = loop.create_task(watchdog_loop(server, app.state.engine_client))
    server_task = loop.create_task(server.serve(sockets=[sock] if sock else None))
    # ... ssl_cert_refresher elided ...

    shutdown_event = asyncio.Event()

    def signal_handler() -> None:
        shutdown_event.set()

    async def dummy_shutdown() -> None:
        pass

    loop.add_signal_handler(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)
    loop.add_signal_handler(signal.SIGTERM, signal_handler)

    async def handle_shutdown() -> None:
        await shutdown_event.wait()

        engine_client = app.state.engine_client
        timeout = engine_client.vllm_config.shutdown_timeout

        await loop.run_in_executor(
            None, partial(engine_client.shutdown, timeout=timeout)
        )

        server.should_exit = True
        server_task.cancel()
        watchdog_task.cancel()
        # ... ssl_cert_refresher.stop() elided ...

    shutdown_task = loop.create_task(handle_shutdown())

    try:
        await server_task
        return dummy_shutdown()
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        # ... log process using port elided ...
        logger.info("Shutting down FastAPI HTTP server.")
        return server.shutdown()
    finally:
        shutdown_task.cancel()
        watchdog_task.cancel()

async def watchdog_loop(server: uvicorn.Server, engine: EngineClient):
    """
    # Watchdog task that runs in the background, checking
    # for error state in the engine. Needed to trigger shutdown
    # if an exception arises is StreamingResponse() generator.
    """
    VLLM_WATCHDOG_TIME_S = 5.0
    while True:
        await asyncio.sleep(VLLM_WATCHDOG_TIME_S)
        terminate_if_errored(server, engine)


def terminate_if_errored(server: uvicorn.Server, engine: EngineClient):
    """
    See discussions here on shutting down a uvicorn server
    https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/discussions/1103
    In this case we cannot await the server shutdown here
    because handler must first return to close the connection
    for this request.
    """
    engine_errored = engine.errored and not engine.is_running
    if not envs.VLLM_KEEP_ALIVE_ON_ENGINE_DEATH and engine_errored:
        server.should_exit = True

model_config: ModelConfig
    renderer: BaseRenderer
    input_processor: InputProcessor

    @property
    @abstractmethod
    def errored(self) -> bool: ...

    @property
    @abstractmethod
    def dead_error(self) -> BaseException: ...

    @abstractmethod
    def generate(
        self,
        prompt: EngineCoreRequest | PromptType | EngineInput | AsyncGenerator[StreamingInput, None],
        sampling_params: SamplingParams,
        request_id: str,
        *,
        prompt_text: str | None = None,
        lora_request: LoRARequest | None = None,
        tokenization_kwargs: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        trace_headers: Mapping[str, str] | None = None,
        priority: int = 0,
        data_parallel_rank: int | None = None,
        reasoning_ended: bool | None = None,
        reasoning_parser_kwargs: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    ) -> AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput, None]:
        """Generate outputs for a request."""
        ...

elide: XRequestIdMiddleware 同文件，主线展示鉴权一项即可

key_classes.name: OpenAIServing
key_classes.responsibility: 所有 OpenAI handler 的基类：持有 engine_client/models/renderer/input_processor；提供模型校验(_check_model)、request_id 解析(_base_request_id)、LoRA 适配(_maybe_get_adapters)、错误响应工厂(create_error_response/create_streaming_error_response)、GenerationError 触发(_raise_if_error)、trace headers、tool-call 提取(_parse_tool_calls_from_content)、token 解码(_get_decoded_token)、system_fingerprint。beam_search 也定义在此。

key_classes.name: OpenAIServingChat
key_classes.responsibility: chat/completions handler：create_chat_completion 渲染请求、造 request_id、算 SamplingParams、调 engine_client.generate，按 request.stream 分流到 chat_completion_stream_generator（SSE DELTA）或 chat_completion_full_generator（聚合 JSON）。装配 reasoning/tool parser，构造 logprobs。

key_classes.name: OpenAIServingRender
key_classes.responsibility: Renderer 适配层：render_chat 把 ChatCompletionRequest 的 messages + chat template 经 renderer.render_chat_async 渲染成 (conversation, engine_inputs=token prompt)；做 chat-template 信任校验、tool_choice 合法性校验、harmony(gpt_oss) 特例。OpenAIServingChat 委托给它。

key_classes.name: build_async_engine_client
key_classes.responsibility: @asynccontextmanager：从 CLI args 造 AsyncEngineArgs，经 build_async_engine_client_from_engine_args 用 AsyncLLM.from_vllm_config 起异步引擎（对接 ch04 三段式 + AsyncMPClient），退出时 shutdown。EngineClient 生命周期边界。

key_classes.name: serve_http
key_classes.responsibility: uvicorn 启动与优雅关停：建 uvicorn.Config/Server、watchdog_task（监控引擎 errored）、server_task、handle_shutdown（SIGINT/SIGTERM → 关引擎 → server.should_exit）。返回 shutdown_task 供上层 await。

key_classes.name: lifespan
key_classes.responsibility: FastAPI lifespan：启动期拉起周期性 do_log_stats 后台任务 + freeze_gc_heap，yield 期间服务，关停期 cancel 任务并 gc app.state。

key_classes.name: AuthenticationMiddleware / XRequestIdMiddleware
key_classes.responsibility: 纯 ASGI 中间件：Bearer token 鉴权（仅 /v1 路径、跳过 OPTIONS）；X-Request-Id 注入响应头。

key_classes.name: EngineClient
key_classes.responsibility: handler 依赖的协议：暴露 generate()(异步生成器)、renderer/input_processor/model_config/vllm_config、errored/dead_error/is_running、shutdown/get_supported_tasks/do_log_stats。AsyncLLM 是其 v1 实现（ch04）。

data_flow: 1. 进程入口 api_server.__main__ → uvloop.run(run_server(args))；run_server → setup_server（绑 socket，先于引擎以避端口竞争）→ run_server_worker。
2. run_server_worker: async with build_async_engine_client(args) → AsyncLLM.from_vllm_config 起异步引擎（ch04）→ build_and_serve。

3. build_and_serve: engine_client.get_supported_tasks → build_app（FastAPI(lifespan)，注册 /v1/* 路由 + CORS/鉴权/X-Request-Id 中间件 + 6 个 exception_handler）→ init_app_state（造 OpenAIServingModels/Render/Tokenization，init_generate_state 造 OpenAIServingChat/Completion，挂 app.state）→ serve_http。
4. serve_http(launcher): 起 uvicorn server_task + watchdog_task + handle_shutdown，返回 shutdown_task；lifespan 在 server 启动时拉起 _force_log + freeze_gc_heap。
5. 请求到来: POST /v1/chat/completions → validate_json_request 依赖 → with_cancellation/load_aware_call 装饰的 create_chat_completion handler → 取 app.state.openai_serving_chat。

6. OpenAIServingChat.create_chat_completion: render_chat_request → _check_model + 引擎存活检查 → OpenAIServingRender.render_chat → renderer.render_chat_async（chat template→prompt token_ids 即 engine_inputs）。
7. request_id = 'chatcmpl-' + _base_request_id（X-Request-Id 头或 random_uuid）；_maybe_get_adapters 取 LoRA；get_max_tokens → to_sampling_params。
8. engine_client.generate(engine_input, sampling_params, sub_request_id, ...) 返回 AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput]（对接 ch04 output_handler 背景任务多路分发）。
9b. 非流式: chat_completion_full_generator —— async for 聚合到最后一个 RequestOutput(FINAL_ONLY 语义)，组装 choices + UsageInfo → ChatCompletionResponse，handler 返回 JSONResponse。

10. 关停: SIGINT/SIGTERM → launcher signal_handler set shutdown_event → handle_shutdown 调 engine_client.shutdown(timeout) → server.should_exit；或 watchdog 每 5s 检测引擎 errored 触发 server.should_exit；run_server_worker 退出 build_async_engine_client 上下文 → async_llm.shutdown，await shutdown_task，sock.close。

design_decisions.decision: 先绑 socket 再起引擎
design_decisions.why: 引擎初始化耗时长且涉及 ray，提前绑端口避免与 ray 的端口竞争（race condition）

design_decisions.decision: EngineClient 用 async 上下文管理器包裹
design_decisions.why: 保证任何错误/退出路径都能 shutdown 引擎、清理子进程；run_server_worker 故意在退出 backend 上下文后才 await server shutdown

design_decisions.decision: 请求渲染前先检查 engine.errored 并抛 dead_error
design_decisions.why: 流式场景下 HTTP 200 在生成开始前就发出，必须在渲染阶段（200 之前）暴露引擎已死，否则客户端拿不到错误

design_decisions.decision: SSE 首块单独发只含 role 的空 delta
design_decisions.why: 对齐 OpenAI 协议：流首先声明 assistant 角色，后续块只追加 content/tool_calls 增量

design_decisions.decision: stream generator 内异常不抛而是写成 SSE error chunk
design_decisions.why: 200 已发出无法改状态码，只能把错误作为下一个 chunk 推给客户端；因此引擎死亡需靠 launcher 的 watchdog 后台任务而非异常来触发关停

design_decisions.decision: watchdog 每 5s 轮询 engine.errored and not is_running
design_decisions.why: StreamingResponse 生成器吞掉异常后服务器不会自动退出；watchdog 兜底设置 server.should_exit（除非 VLLM_KEEP_ALIVE_ON_ENGINE_DEATH）

design_decisions.decision: 优雅关停经 run_in_executor 调 engine.shutdown
design_decisions.why: engine.shutdown 是同步阻塞调用，放到 executor 避免阻塞事件循环；之后才 cancel server_task/watchdog_task

design_decisions.decision: with_cancellation 装饰器用双任务竞速监听客户端断连
design_decisions.why: request.is_disconnected 在中间件下不可靠；改为同时 await handler_task 与 disconnect-listener，先完成者取消另一个，实现请求级取消

design_decisions.decision: request_id 优先取 X-Request-Id 头
design_decisions.why: 便于路由/网关贯穿追踪同一请求；否则 random_uuid；chat 前缀 'chatcmpl-'

design_decisions.decision: 鉴权与 request_id 用纯 ASGI 中间件而非 FastAPI 依赖
design_decisions.why: 纯 ASGI 在更低层拦截、跳过非 /v1 路径与 OPTIONS（CORS 预检），用 sha256+compare_digest 防时序侧信道

design_decisions.decision: system_fingerprint 仅盖在非流式响应与流式终止块
design_decisions.why: 启动期算一次缓存；逐块盖会有 per-chunk 开销，故流式只在 finish_reason 块或末尾 usage 块标注

design_decisions.decision: render 与 engine 解耦（OpenAIServingRender 可无引擎独立运行）
design_decisions.why: 支持 GPU-less render server；OpenAIServingChat 仅在其上加引擎相关校验（LoRA/健康），渲染逻辑单一真相源在 render serving

theory: 流式 vs 非流式的本质差异：二者消费的是同一个 engine_client.generate 异步生成器（ch04 中 output_handler 把 EngineCoreOutput 经 per-request asyncio.Queue 多路分发）。流式把每个 RequestOutput.outputs[i].text 作为增量 delta 立即 yield 成 SSE；非流式 async for 直到生成器耗尽，只保留最后一个 RequestOutput（vLLM v1 增量输出语义下末个累积了全文）再聚合。延迟权衡：流式 TTFT 低、逐 token 推送；非流式一次性返回、聚合 usage/logprobs/prompt_logprobs。

SSE 帧格式：每条消息为 'data: ' + JSON + '

'，终止哨兵 'data: [DONE]

'；media_type='text/event-stream'。错误在流中表现为含 error 字段的 data 帧（因 200 已发出无法改状态码）。
异步背压与取消：handler 是协程，with_cancellation 让客户端断连能取消 handler_task；非流式 full_generator 捕获 asyncio.CancelledError 返回 'Client disconnected'。整条链路无阻塞调用（除 engine.shutdown 显式丢进 executor）。
并发模型：单事件循环（uvloop）+ uvicorn；多请求共享一个 AsyncLLM，靠 ch04 的 per-request 队列与背景 output_handler 实现 fan-out，不为每请求开线程。
request_id 复杂度与幂等：n>1 或多 prompt 时派生 sub_request_id = f'{request_id}_{i}' 保证引擎侧唯一；本章主线 assert len(generators)==1（n==1 单 prompt）。

delete.what: build_app 中除 chat/completion 之外的条件路由注册（pooling/transcription/realtime/speech_to_text/disagg/rlhf/elastic_ep/generative_scoring/sagemaker/render router）
delete.why_safe: 本章只讲 generate 任务的 chat/completion 主线；这些路由是平行的其他 API surface，删去不影响 chat 请求从 HTTP 到 AsyncLLM 的控制流。
harmony 是 gpt_oss 专用渲染/解析路径，与普通 chat template→prompt 主线正交；删去后普通模型路径完整。

delete.what: mistral grammar 路径（_grammar_from_tool_parser、extract_maybe_reasoning_and_tool_streaming、MistralToolParser 特例、is_mistral_* 分支）
delete.why_safe: Mistral 工具语法是特定 tokenizer 的特殊处理，普通 tool_parser/reasoning_parser 路径不依赖它。

delete.what: beam_search 方法及 use_beam_search 分支
delete.why_safe: beam search 不是 OpenAI 兼容流式/非流式主线，且自成一套多 beam 调度，删去不影响普通采样请求。

delete.what: tool_choice 的 named/required 流式与非流式细分组装（extract_named_tool_call_streaming/extract_required_tool_call_streaming、_create_remaining_args_delta、kimi_k2 history_tool_call_cnt、make_tool_call_id 多分支）的逐分支实现
delete.why_safe: 可保留『按 tool_choice 组装 ChatMessage/DeltaMessage』的骨架与一条 auto 路径作示例，删去 named/required/各 id_type 的穷举分支不破坏主控制流；精简版保留 tool_calls 字段存在性即可。

delete.what: OpenAIServingTokenization/embed/pooling、init_render_app_state、build_and_serve_renderer、speech_to_text 等非 chat 服务对象的实例化
delete.why_safe: 与 chat 请求路径无关的平行服务，删去不影响主线。

delete.what: load_aware_call / ScalingMiddleware / server_load_metrics 负载追踪、orca metrics_header、enable_log_outputs/enable_log_deltas 日志
delete.why_safe: 可观测性/负载均衡侧路，删去不改变请求语义。

delete.what: SSLCertRefresher、uds(unix socket)、ipv6、h11 header 限制、forkserver 预导入、multi-API-process 的 client_count/client_index 拆分
delete.why_safe: 部署期可选项，主线单进程 TCP 无 SSL 场景不触及。
logprobs 装配在 ch10 已专门讲；本章可在响应里保留 logprobs 字段占位而省略其计算细节，不影响流式/非流式骨架。

must_keep.why: EngineClient 生命周期边界、起 AsyncLLM 的入口，是承接 ch04 的关键。
实际调用 AsyncLLM.from_vllm_config 与 finally shutdown 的地方。
展示『async with 引擎上下文 → build_and_serve → await shutdown_task』的顶层编排。
先绑 socket、装 SIGTERM handler 的启动序，体现『先于引擎绑端口』设计。
get_supported_tasks → build_app → init_app_state → serve_http 的串联。
FastAPI(lifespan=lifespan) + 注册路由 + exception_handler 的装配中心。
把 OpenAIServingChat 等 handler 挂到 app.state 的地方，连接路由与 handler。
FastAPI 生命周期：启动后台 log task + freeze_gc_heap，本章明确点名。
handler 基类，request_id/校验/错误处理/tool 提取的真相源。
request_id 解析（X-Request-Id 优先），读者需理解。
请求校验（模型名/LoRA/404）核心。
统一错误响应工厂，writer 需讲错误处理。
流式错误以 data 帧返回的机制。
finish_reason=='error' → GenerationError 的桥。
chat handler 主体。
渲染→request_id→SamplingParams→generate→分流的主方法。
OpenAIServingChat 加引擎校验后委托 render 的桥。
SSE 流式 DELTA 主路径。
非流式 FINAL_ONLY 聚合主路径。
Renderer 适配层，chat template→prompt 的归宿。
渲染核心方法（preprocess_chat 入口）。
build_chat_params + renderer.render_chat_async 的实际渲染点。
uvicorn 启动 + 优雅关停 + watchdog 的中枢。
引擎死亡兜底关停，本章重点。
engine.errored → server.should_exit 的判定。
SIGINT/SIGTERM → 关引擎 → server.should_exit 的优雅关停（注意此为 serve_http 内嵌函数，精简版应作为 serve_http 内部逻辑保留，可检测为 server.should_exit 赋值 + engine shutdown 调用）。
API router handler 同名（serving 与 router 两处），SSE vs JSON 分流体现在 router 的 StreamingResponse/JSONResponse。
客户端断连取消请求的装饰器，异步语义关键。
Bearer 鉴权中间件，请求校验一环。
SSE 的 FastAPI 出口（media_type=text/event-stream），区分流式/非流式的落点。
非流式 JSON 响应模型。
流式 chunk 响应模型。
流式增量载体（role/content/tool_calls）。
用量聚合，流式末块/非流式都需。

diagram_plan.name: ch32-request-lifecycle
diagram_plan.spec: 竖向泳道流程图：HTTP POST /v1/chat/completions → [FastAPI: validate_json_request + with_cancellation + Auth/X-Request-Id 中间件] → create_chat_completion handler → OpenAIServingChat.create_chat_completion → [render_chat_request: _check_model + engine.errored 检查] → OpenAIServingRender.render_chat → renderer.render_chat_async(chat template→prompt token_ids) → [request_id + SamplingParams] → engine_client.generate(AsyncLLM, 异步生成器) → 分叉：(stream) chat_completion_stream_generator → SSE 'data:{}\n\n' .. '[DONE]' → StreamingResponse；(非stream) chat_completion_full_generator → 聚合 → ChatCompletionResponse → JSONResponse。高亮 engine_client.generate 为与 ch04 的接缝。
diagram_plan.roadmap_highlight: entrypoints / openai server (ch32)，标注上游 ch31 离线 LLM、ch04 AsyncLLM 三段式 + output_handler

diagram_plan.name: ch32-startup-shutdown
diagram_plan.spec: 启动+关停时序：run_server → setup_server(绑 socket, SIGTERM) → build_async_engine_client(起 AsyncLLM) → build_and_serve(build_app/init_app_state/serve_http) → serve_http 起 server_task+watchdog_task+handle_shutdown；lifespan 拉起 _force_log + freeze_gc_heap。关停分支：SIGINT/SIGTERM→shutdown_event→handle_shutdown→engine.shutdown(run_in_executor)→server.should_exit；并行 watchdog 每 5s 检 engine.errored→server.should_exit。退出 build_async_engine_client 上下文→async_llm.shutdown→sock.close。

diagram_plan.name: ch32-stream-vs-final
diagram_plan.spec: 对照表两列：流式(DELTA) vs 非流式(FINAL_ONLY)。行：消费方式(逐 RequestOutput yield / async for 取末个)、首块(role 空 delta / 无)、增量载体(DeltaMessage SSE / ChatMessage)、用量(可选末块 usage / response.usage)、错误处理(error data 帧, 200 已发 / ErrorResponse JSON 可改状态码)、终止(data:[DONE] / 直接返回)、FastAPI 出口(StreamingResponse text/event-stream / JSONResponse)、同源(同一 engine_client.generate 生成器)。

foreshadow_due.note: scripts/bible.py due ch32 返回空（无应埋/应回收登记项）。本章是 entrypoints 子系统收尾章，依赖 ch31(离线 LLM 对照) 与 ch04(AsyncLLM 三段式/output_handler)；engine_client.generate 异步生成器、AsyncLLM.from_vllm_config、output_handler 多路分发为承接 ch04 的接缝，logprobs 装配承接 ch10。
